name: Ferplast Fantcat Collar Asstd C10/3
shortDescription: Bring style, comfort, and safety to your cat’s everyday adventures with the FERPLAST FANTCAT Collar Assortment. Thoughtfully designed for felines and other small pets, this collection features three high-quality nylon collars in assorted colors, giving you both variety and convenience in one pack.
description: Key Features & Details . Durable & Comfortable Material – Made from high-quality, strong yet soft nylon, these collars combine resilience with comfort. The fabric is gentle on fur and skin, making it ideal for everyday wear without causing irritation. . Fully Adjustable Fit – Designed to suit a range of neck sizes, each collar can be easily adjusted using a sliding buckle or micro-regulating system, ensuring a snug yet comfortable fit for your cat or other small pets.
